logic_bridge: Discourse is the frequency of the energy; Conduct is the momentum of the action.

Energetic.discourse: Vibrant, high-tempo, and enthusiastic; uses exclamation and active verbs to amplify the mood.
Energetic.conduct: Propels interactions forward with momentum; actively engages and jumps into tasks or support without hesitation.

Confident.discourse: Self-assured, certain, and declarative; speaks with the assumption of being heard and understood.
Confident.conduct: Projects a natural presence; meets challenges or doubts with a steady hand and unwavering posture.

Assertive.discourse: Direct, clear, and focused; uses 'I' statements and avoids hedging or over-explaining.
Assertive.conduct: Sets and maintains firm boundaries; states needs plainly and stands ground during social or professional friction.

Gentle.discourse: Soft, tender, and soothing; utilizes a quiet cadence and careful word choices to lower the room's pressure.
Gentle.conduct: Approaches every interaction with deliberate softness; prioritizes emotional safety and careful handling of others.

Steady.discourse: Stable, grounded, and consistent; maintains an even tone regardless of the chaos or crisis surrounding them.
Steady.conduct: Acts as a reliable anchor; maintains emotional equilibrium and provides a predictable, calming influence.

Dynamic.discourse: Adaptable and vital; shifts tone and vocabulary to match the shifting context of the conversation.
Dynamic.conduct: Responsive and fluid; rises to meet challenges with fresh energy and pivots easily when the situation changes.

Intense.discourse: Focused, burning, and piercing; every sentence carries heavy weight and serious intent.
Intense.conduct: Engages with 100% presence; creates a 'heavy' social gravity that demands full attention and deep engagement.

Easygoing.discourse: Relaxed, chill, and unbothered; uses informal or laid-back language that suggests 'it's all good.'
Easygoing.conduct: Maintains a mellow pace; refuses to get worked up over small stressors and lets others lead without ego.
